description: Ingest Gong call metadata and transcripts via Gong API v2 and return a pandas DataFrame.

outputs.description: DataFrame of call metadata with optional transcript column

asset_name.label: Asset Name
asset_name.description: Name of the asset to create

resource_name.label: Resource Name
resource_name.description: Key of the GongResource this asset depends on for authentication

from_date_time.label: From Date/Time
from_date_time.description: Start of the call window (ISO-8601, e.g. '2026-06-01T00:00:00Z')

to_date_time.label: To Date/Time
to_date_time.description: End of the call window (ISO-8601, e.g. '2026-07-01T00:00:00Z')

include_transcript.label: Include Transcript
include_transcript.description: If true, fetch transcripts via POST /v2/calls/transcript and merge into the DataFrame

limit.label: Limit
limit.description: Maximum number of calls to fetch across all pages

owners.label: Owners
owners.description: Asset owners — team names (team:revops) or email addresses.

asset_tags.label: Asset Tags
asset_tags.description: Key-value tags applied to the asset in the Dagster catalog.

kinds.label: Kinds
kinds.description: Asset kinds shown in the Dagster catalog. Defaults to ['gong', 'python'].

include_preview_metadata.label: Include Preview Metadata
include_preview_metadata.description: Include sample data preview in metadata

preview_rows.label: Preview Rows
preview_rows.description: Rows to include in the preview metadata

deps.label: Deps
deps.description: Lineage-only upstream asset keys (no data passed at runtime)

name: Gong Calls Ingestion
